div.div: Hub-Spoke Architecture — VPC Serverless Access Connectors (No Hybrid NAT)

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #3C4043;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#3C4043, #b3b7b9); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Key Differences from Direct VPC Egress
✓ No overlapping 240.0.0.0/8 subnet — Cloud Run connects through VPC Connector VMs, not directly into VPC
✓ No Hybrid NAT — connector VM IPs (10.10.x.0/28) are already unique and routable across the hub-spoke topology
✓ 3 subnets per spoke (connector, routable, proxy) vs 4 (overlap, routable, proxy, pnat)
